agora_get_frontpage_posts.name: agora_get_frontpage_posts
agora_get_frontpage_posts.params_signature: sort?: 'hot'|'best'|'new'|'rising'|'top'|'controversial', t?: 'hour'|'day'|'week'|'month'|'year'|'all', limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer, show?: string
agora_get_frontpage_posts.use: Fetch frontpage posts from Agora (Reddit); use 't' only with 'top'/'controversial' sorts, and 'after'/'before' take fullnames like t3_abc123; default limit 25, max 100.
agora_get_frontpage_posts.returns: Reddit Listing with children (posts), after, before for pagination.

agora_get_post_content.name: agora_get_post_content
agora_get_post_content.params_signature: article: string, subreddit?: string, comment?: string, context?: integer, depth?: integer, limit?: integer, sort?: string, showedits?: boolean, showmedia?: boolean, showmore?: boolean, showtitle?: boolean, sr_detail?: boolean
agora_get_post_content.use: Fetch a Reddit post and its comment tree; pass article as the ID36 without the t3_ prefix, and comment (if used) as a bare ID36.
agora_get_post_content.returns: Post details and a nested comments tree sorted by the chosen order.

agora_get_subreddit_info.name: agora_get_subreddit_info
agora_get_subreddit_info.use: Get information about a subreddit including subscribers, description, and rules; provide the name without the 'r/' prefix.
agora_get_subreddit_info.returns: Subreddit info object with fields like subscribers, description, and rules.

agora_get_subreddit_posts.name: agora_get_subreddit_posts
agora_get_subreddit_posts.params_signature: subreddit: string, sort?: 'hot'|'best'|'new'|'rising'|'top'|'controversial', t?: 'hour'|'day'|'week'|'month'|'year'|'all', limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer, show?: string
agora_get_subreddit_posts.use: Fetch posts from a subreddit (name without r/ prefix); t applies only to top/controversial sorts; after/before take t3_-style fullnames; limit defaults to 25, max 100.
agora_get_subreddit_posts.returns: Reddit Listing with children (posts), after, and before cursors.

agora_list_subreddits.name: agora_list_subreddits
agora_list_subreddits.params_signature: where?: 'popular'|'new'|'default', limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer
agora_list_subreddits.use: List subreddits on Agora (Reddit) by category; use `after`/`before` fullnames for pagination; default limit is 25, max 100.
agora_list_subreddits.returns: Reddit Listing of subreddit objects with fields like children, after, before.

agora_search_subreddits.name: agora_search_subreddits
agora_search_subreddits.params_signature: query: string, exact?: boolean, include_over_18?: boolean, include_unadvertisable?: boolean
agora_search_subreddits.use: Search Agora (Reddit) subreddits whose names begin with the query string.
agora_search_subreddits.returns: List of matching subreddits with names and metadata; see tool response.

agora_create_subreddit.name: agora_create_subreddit
agora_create_subreddit.params_signature: name: string, title?: string, description: string, public_description?: string, subreddit_type?: 'public'|'restricted'|'private', over_18?: boolean
agora_create_subreddit.use: Create a new Agora (Reddit) subreddit; name must be 3-21 chars of alphanumerics/underscores.

agora_subscribe.name: agora_subscribe
agora_subscribe.params_signature: action: 'sub'|'unsub', sr?: string, sr_name?: string, skip_initial_defaults?: boolean
agora_subscribe.use: Subscribe to or unsubscribe from a subreddit; identify it via sr (t5_ fullname) or sr_name (plain name without r/ prefix).

agora_get_subreddit_rules.name: agora_get_subreddit_rules
agora_get_subreddit_rules.use: Fetch the community rules and posting guidelines for a subreddit; provide the name without the 'r/' prefix.
agora_get_subreddit_rules.returns: Rules list with fields like short_name, description, and priority.

agora_subreddits_mine.name: agora_subreddits_mine
agora_subreddits_mine.params_signature: limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer
agora_subreddits_mine.use: List subreddits the authenticated Reddit user is subscribed to; use fullname cursors (e.g. 't5_') for after/before pagination, default limit 25, max 100.
agora_subreddits_mine.returns: Reddit Listing with children array of subreddit objects, plus after/before cursors.

agora_get_subreddit_moderators.name: agora_get_subreddit_moderators
agora_get_subreddit_moderators.use: List the moderators of a subreddit on Agora (Reddit); provide the name without the 'r/' prefix.
agora_get_subreddit_moderators.returns: A UserList object containing moderator user entries.

agora_submit.name: agora_submit
agora_submit.params_signature: sr: string, title: string, kind: 'self'|'link'|'image'|'video'|'videogif', text: string, url?: string, flair_id?: string, flair_text?: string, nsfw?: boolean, spoiler?: boolean, resubmit?: boolean, sendreplies?: boolean
agora_submit.use: Submit a new post to a subreddit (name without r/ prefix); title max 300 chars, text is markdown for self posts, url required for link posts.
agora_submit.returns: Submission result with new post id/url or success/error status

agora_comment.name: agora_comment
agora_comment.params_signature: thing_id: string, text: string, return_rtjson?: boolean, richtext_json?: string
agora_comment.use: Submit a comment on an Agora (Reddit) post or reply to another comment; thing_id uses t3_ prefix for posts, t1_ for comments, text is markdown (max 10000 chars).
agora_comment.returns: Created comment object; rich text JSON if return_rtjson is true.

agora_vote.name: agora_vote
agora_vote.params_signature: id: string, dir: integer, rank?: integer
agora_vote.use: Cast a vote on an Agora (Reddit) post or comment; use fullname IDs ('t3_' for posts, 't1_' for comments) and dir 1=up, 0=unvote, -1=down.

agora_del.name: agora_del
agora_del.use: Delete one of your own Agora (Reddit) posts or comments by fullname; use 't3_' prefix for posts and 't1_' for comments.

agora_editusertext.name: agora_editusertext
agora_editusertext.params_signature: thing_id: string, text: string, return_rtjson?: boolean
agora_editusertext.use: Edit the markdown body of a self-post or comment; thing_id must be a fullname ('t3_' for posts, 't1_' for comments).

agora_save.name: agora_save
agora_save.use: Save a post or comment on Agora (Reddit) using its fullname (t3_ prefix for posts, t1_ for comments); category requires Reddit Gold.

agora_unsave.name: agora_unsave
agora_unsave.use: Unsave a previously saved Agora (Reddit) post or comment using its fullname ('t3_' prefix for posts, 't1_' for comments).

agora_hide.name: agora_hide
agora_hide.use: Hide posts from your Agora (Reddit) frontpage by passing a comma-separated list of post fullnames prefixed with 't3_'.

agora_unhide.name: agora_unhide
agora_unhide.use: Unhide one or more Reddit posts; pass a comma-separated list of post fullnames prefixed with 't3_'.

agora_info.name: agora_info
agora_info.params_signature: id?: string, url?: string, sr_name?: string
agora_info.use: Look up Agora (Reddit) posts/comments by fullname (t3_ for posts, t1_ for comments), URL, or subreddit names; id accepts comma-separated fullnames.
agora_info.returns: Listing of Thing objects with fields like id, name, kind, and data.

agora_follow_post.name: agora_follow_post
agora_follow_post.use: Follow or unfollow an Agora (Reddit) post to receive new-comment notifications; fullname must use the 't3_' post prefix.

agora_morechildren.name: agora_morechildren
agora_morechildren.params_signature: link_id: string, children: string, sort?: string, depth?: integer, limit_children?: boolean, id?: string
agora_morechildren.use: Load additional Reddit comments from a 'more comments' expansion; link_id must be a t3_ fullname and children is a CSV of comment id36s.
agora_morechildren.returns: Object with things array of additional comment nodes.

agora_get_user.name: agora_get_user
agora_get_user.params_signature: username: string, where?: 'about'|'overview'|'submitted'|'comments'|'saved'|'hidden'|'upvoted'|'downvoted', sort?: 'hot'|'new'|'top'|'controversial', t?: 'hour'|'day'|'week'|'month'|'year'|'all', type?: 'links'|'comments', limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer, context?: integer, sr_detail?: boolean
agora_get_user.use: Fetch a Reddit user's profile or activity (posts, comments, saved, etc.); after/before take thing fullnames, limit defaults to 25 (max 100).
agora_get_user.returns: User object (for about) or Listing with children, after, before for activity sections.

agora_search_users.name: agora_search_users
agora_search_users.params_signature: q: string, sort?: 'relevance'|'activity', limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer
agora_search_users.use: Search Agora (Reddit) users by username; use after/before with a t2_ fullname for pagination.
agora_search_users.returns: Listing of user objects with fields like children, after, before.

agora_me.name: agora_me
agora_me.use: Get information about the currently authenticated Agora (Reddit) user.
agora_me.returns: User object with fields such as id, name, karma, and account metadata.

agora_me_karma.name: agora_me_karma
agora_me_karma.use: Get the authenticated user's karma breakdown by subreddit on Agora (Reddit).
agora_me_karma.returns: List of per-subreddit karma entries with fields like sr, comment_karma, link_karma.

agora_search.name: agora_search
agora_search.params_signature: q: string, subreddit?: string, restrict_sr?: boolean, sort?: 'relevance'|'hot'|'top'|'new'|'comments', t?: 'hour'|'day'|'week'|'month'|'year'|'all', type?: 'link'|'comment'|'sr'|'user', limit?: integer, after?: string, before?: string, count?: integer, include_facets?: boolean, sr_detail?: boolean
agora_search.use: Search Reddit for posts, comments, subreddits, or users; use after/before with fullname IDs (t3_, t1_, t5_, t2_) for pagination, limit defaults to 25 (max 100).
agora_search.returns: Reddit Listing object with children array of matching things and after/before pagination cursors.

agora_save_post_draft.name: agora_save_post_draft
agora_save_post_draft.params_signature: subreddit_name: string, title: string, post_type?: 'text'|'self'|'link'|'image'|'video'|'videogif', content?: string, url?: string, is_nsfw?: boolean, is_spoiler?: boolean, flair_text?: string
agora_save_post_draft.use: Save or update a Reddit post draft for later publishing; title max 300 chars, post_type defaults to 'text', is_nsfw/is_spoiler default to false.

agora_get_post_draft.name: agora_get_post_draft
agora_get_post_draft.use: Retrieve details of a specific Agora (Reddit) post draft by its draft ID.
agora_get_post_draft.returns: Draft object with fields such as id, title, body, subreddit, and timestamps.

agora_list_post_drafts.name: agora_list_post_drafts
agora_list_post_drafts.use: List all post drafts belonging to the currently authenticated Agora (Reddit) user.
agora_list_post_drafts.returns: Array of draft objects; see tool response

agora_publish_post_draft.name: agora_publish_post_draft
agora_publish_post_draft.use: Publish a saved Agora (Reddit) draft as a post in the given subreddit and delete the draft.

agora_delete_post_draft.name: agora_delete_post_draft
agora_delete_post_draft.use: Delete a Reddit post draft by its draft ID.

nest_zillow_ping.name: nest_zillow_ping
nest_zillow_ping.use: Ping the Zillow API to test connectivity, measure response time, and retrieve metadata about available filter options like property and listing types.
nest_zillow_ping.returns: Status, response time, and API metadata including available filter options.

nest_zillow_getPropertyTypes.name: nest_zillow_getPropertyTypes
nest_zillow_getPropertyTypes.use: List all property types available as search filters, including descriptions and database mappings shared with the frontend UI.
nest_zillow_getPropertyTypes.returns: Array of property type objects with name, description, and database mapping fields.

nest_zillow_searchListings.name: nest_zillow_searchListings
nest_zillow_searchListings.params_signature: location?: string, listing_type?: 'for_sale'|'for_rent'|'sold', min_price?: number, max_price?: number, min_beds?: integer, max_beds?: integer, min_baths?: number, max_baths?: number, property_types?: array, has_photos?: boolean, has_3d_tour?: boolean, has_pool?: boolean, has_garage?: boolean, no_hoa?: boolean, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_searchListings.use: Search active Zillow listings (for sale, rent, or sold) by location, price, beds/baths, property type, and feature filters; location accepts city, state, ZIP, or address.
nest_zillow_searchListings.returns: List of matching property listings with details like price, address, beds, baths, and features.

nest_zillow_getListingDetails.name: nest_zillow_getListingDetails
nest_zillow_getListingDetails.use: Get comprehensive details for a Zillow real estate listing including features, photos, pricing, price/tax history, schools, open houses, and agent info.
nest_zillow_getListingDetails.returns: Listing object with property facts, photos, priceHistory, taxHistory, schools, openHouses, agent, and engagement metrics.

nest_zillow_calculateMortgage.name: nest_zillow_calculateMortgage
nest_zillow_calculateMortgage.params_signature: home_price: number, down_payment: number, loan_term_years?: integer, interest_rate: number, property_tax_annual?: number, home_insurance_annual?: number, hoa_monthly?: number, pmi_rate?: number
nest_zillow_calculateMortgage.use: Calculate monthly mortgage payment and total costs given home price, down payment, and interest rate, with optional taxes, insurance, HOA, and PMI inputs.

nest_zillow_searchSchools.name: nest_zillow_searchSchools
nest_zillow_searchSchools.params_signature: min_rating?: number, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_searchSchools.use: Search Zillow schools, optionally filtering by minimum rating (0-10), with pagination via limit (1-100) and offset.
nest_zillow_searchSchools.returns: List of schools with rating, enrollment, and type fields.

nest_zillow_getPropertyValuation.name: nest_zillow_getPropertyValuation
nest_zillow_getPropertyValuation.use: Get the Zestimate property valuation for a Zillow listing by its listing_id.
nest_zillow_getPropertyValuation.returns: Estimated value with confidence score and value range.

nest_zillow_savedHomes.name: nest_zillow_savedHomes
nest_zillow_savedHomes.params_signature: action: 'save'|'unsave'|'list'|'get', property_id?: string, notes?: string, status?: array, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_savedHomes.use: Manage the logged-in user's saved Zillow properties; property_id is required for save/unsave/get, status filter and limit/offset apply to list.
nest_zillow_savedHomes.returns: Saved property record(s) or list with pagination; success/error status for save/unsave.

nest_zillow_savedSearches.name: nest_zillow_savedSearches
nest_zillow_savedSearches.params_signature: action: 'create'|'list'|'get'|'update'|'delete', search_id?: string, name?: string, filters?: object, frequency?: 'instant'|'daily'|'never', email_alerts?: boolean, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_savedSearches.use: Manage the logged-in user's saved Zillow searches; requires authentication, search_id is needed for get/update/delete, and deletes are soft (recoverable).

nest_zillow_scheduleTour.name: nest_zillow_scheduleTour
nest_zillow_scheduleTour.params_signature: listing_id: string, date: string, time: string, tour_type?: 'in_person'|'virtual'|'self_guided', attendee_name?: string, attendee_email?: string, attendee_phone?: string, special_requests?: string
nest_zillow_scheduleTour.use: Schedule a Zillow property tour; date must be YYYY-MM-DD and time HH:MM, attendee_email must be a valid email.

nest_zillow_listTours.name: nest_zillow_listTours
nest_zillow_listTours.params_signature: status_filter?: 'pending'|'scheduled'|'completed'|'cancelled', listing_id?: string, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_listTours.use: List scheduled Zillow property tours, optionally filtered by status or listing, with pagination via limit (1-100) and offset.
nest_zillow_listTours.returns: Array of tour records; see tool response for exact shape.

nest_zillow_cancelTour.name: nest_zillow_cancelTour
nest_zillow_cancelTour.use: Cancel a previously scheduled Zillow home tour by its tour ID, optionally providing a cancellation reason.

nest_zillow_rescheduleTour.name: nest_zillow_rescheduleTour
nest_zillow_rescheduleTour.params_signature: tour_id: string, date: string, time: string, special_requests?: string
nest_zillow_rescheduleTour.use: Reschedule an existing Zillow tour; date must be YYYY-MM-DD and time must be HH:MM (24-hour).

nest_zillow_getTourDetails.name: nest_zillow_getTourDetails
nest_zillow_getTourDetails.use: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Zillow tour, including associated property details.
nest_zillow_getTourDetails.returns: Tour object with fields like tour_id, property, schedule, and status.

nest_zillow_searchAgents.name: nest_zillow_searchAgents
nest_zillow_searchAgents.params_signature: location?: string, specialties?: array, min_rating?: number, years_experience?: integer, languages?: array, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_searchAgents.use: Search Zillow real estate agents by location, specialties, minimum rating (0-5), experience, and languages; supports pagination via limit (1-50) and offset.

nest_zillow_getAgentDetails.name: nest_zillow_getAgentDetails
nest_zillow_getAgentDetails.use: Retrieve detailed Zillow profile for a real estate agent including bio, specialties, certifications, stats, and contact info.
nest_zillow_getAgentDetails.returns: Agent object with bio, specialties, certifications, stats, and contact details.

nest_zillow_contactAgent.name: nest_zillow_contactAgent
nest_zillow_contactAgent.params_signature: listing_id: string|number, name: string, email: string, phone: string, message: string, wants_financing?: boolean
nest_zillow_contactAgent.use: Contact the listing agent for a Zillow property with an inquiry message; phone must be US/Canadian format (10 digits, or 11 starting with 1).

nest_zillow_listAgentMessages.name: nest_zillow_listAgentMessages
nest_zillow_listAgentMessages.params_signature: agent_id?: string, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
nest_zillow_listAgentMessages.use: List messages exchanged with Zillow real estate agents, optionally filtered by agent_id, with pagination (limit max 50).

nest_zillow_comparables.name: nest_zillow_comparables
nest_zillow_comparables.use: Find recently sold comparable properties for a given Zillow property to support pricing analysis and market valuation.
nest_zillow_comparables.returns: List of comparable properties with sale details; see tool response

nest_zillow_neighborhoodStats.name: nest_zillow_neighborhoodStats
nest_zillow_neighborhoodStats.use: Get comprehensive neighborhood statistics including demographics, crime, schools, walkability, and amenities; accepts city, neighborhood, or 'Neighborhood, City' format.
nest_zillow_neighborhoodStats.returns: Neighborhood stats object with demographics, crime, schools, walkability, and amenities fields.

nest_zillow_rentVsBuyCalculator.name: nest_zillow_rentVsBuyCalculator
nest_zillow_rentVsBuyCalculator.params_signature: home_price: number, down_payment: number, loan_term_years?: integer, interest_rate: number, monthly_rent: number, rent_increase_rate?: number, property_tax_rate?: number, home_insurance_annual?: number, hoa_monthly?: number, maintenance_rate?: number, home_appreciation_rate?: number, investment_return_rate?: number, years_to_stay?: integer, tax_rate?: number, closing_costs?: number, selling_costs_percent?: number
nest_zillow_rentVsBuyCalculator.use: Compare total costs of renting versus buying a home over a holding period, factoring in appreciation, tax deductions, and opportunity cost of the down payment.
nest_zillow_rentVsBuyCalculator.returns: Object comparing buy vs rent scenarios with total costs, net cost, break-even year, and recommendation.

latch_fakelook_auth_login.name: latch_fakelook_auth_login
latch_fakelook_auth_login.use: Authenticate a FakeLook user by email and password, recording login activity for session tracking.
latch_fakelook_auth_login.returns: Authenticated user object and auth state.

latch_fakelook_auth_logout.name: latch_fakelook_auth_logout
latch_fakelook_auth_logout.use: Log out the currently authenticated Latch (Outlook) FakeLook user and clear the session state.
latch_fakelook_auth_logout.returns: Updated auth state indicating the user is logged out.

latch_list_emails.name: latch_list_emails
latch_list_emails.use: List recent Outlook emails from the specified folder, ordered newest first; limit capped at 100.
latch_list_emails.returns: Array of email summaries (id, subject, sender, received date).

latch_get_conversation_messages.name: latch_get_conversation_messages
latch_get_conversation_messages.params_signature: conversationId: string, limit?: integer, offset?: integer
latch_get_conversation_messages.use: Fetch messages in an Outlook conversation thread ordered oldest to newest; accepts a conversation ID or message ID, returns up to 100 (default 10).
latch_get_conversation_messages.returns: List of message objects in the conversation thread

latch_list_mail_folders.name: latch_list_mail_folders
latch_list_mail_folders.use: List all mail folders in the authenticated user's Outlook mailbox.
latch_list_mail_folders.returns: Array of mail folder objects (id, displayName, etc.); see tool response for exact shape.

latch_view_email.name: latch_view_email
latch_view_email.use: Fetch a single Outlook email by its message ID; returns only that message, not the full thread, and optionally marks it read.
latch_view_email.returns: Email object with fields like subject, from, body, receivedDateTime, isRead.

latch_search_emails.name: latch_search_emails
latch_search_emails.params_signature: query?: string, folder?: string, from?: string, to?: string, cc?: string, dateFrom?: string, dateTo?: string, readStatus?: 'all'|'read'|'unread', hasAttachments?: boolean, limit?: number
latch_search_emails.use: Search Outlook emails by text, folder, sender/recipient, date range, read status, or attachments; dates use YYYY-MM-DD, from/to/cc require exact email addresses.
latch_search_emails.returns: List of matching emails (up to limit, default 50, max 100) with standard email fields.

latch_send_email.name: latch_send_email
latch_send_email.params_signature: to: array, subject: string, body: string, cc?: array, bcc?: array, saveAsDraft?: boolean, importance?: 'low'|'normal'|'high'
latch_send_email.use: Send (or draft) an Outlook email via Latch to the given recipients with optional CC/BCC and importance level.

latch_create_reply_draft.name: latch_create_reply_draft
latch_create_reply_draft.params_signature: messageId: string, message: string, cc?: array, bcc?: array
latch_create_reply_draft.use: Create a draft reply to an Outlook email message without sending it, optionally adding CC and BCC recipients.

latch_create_reply_all_draft.name: latch_create_reply_all_draft
latch_create_reply_all_draft.params_signature: messageId: string, message: string, cc?: array, bcc?: array
latch_create_reply_all_draft.use: Create an Outlook draft reply-all to the specified email message without sending it.

latch_create_forward_draft.name: latch_create_forward_draft
latch_create_forward_draft.params_signature: messageId: string, message?: string, toRecipients: array, cc?: array, bcc?: array
latch_create_forward_draft.use: Create a draft forward of an Outlook email message without sending it.

latch_reply_to_email.name: latch_reply_to_email
latch_reply_to_email.params_signature: messageId: string, message: string, cc?: array, bcc?: array, replyAll?: boolean
latch_reply_to_email.use: Reply to an Outlook email message; defaults to replying only to the sender unless replyAll is true.

latch_forward_email.name: latch_forward_email
latch_forward_email.params_signature: messageId: string, message?: string, toRecipients: array
latch_forward_email.use: Forward an existing Outlook email message to one or more recipients, optionally including additional message content.

latch_send_draft.name: latch_send_draft
latch_send_draft.use: Send a previously created Outlook draft message via Latch.

latch_mark_email_read.name: latch_mark_email_read
latch_mark_email_read.use: Mark one or more Outlook emails as read or unread in bulk via Latch.

latch_delete_email.name: latch_delete_email
latch_delete_email.use: Delete one or more Outlook emails by ID; messages outside the Deleted folder are moved there, messages already in Deleted are permanently removed.

latch_move_email.name: latch_move_email
latch_move_email.use: Move one or more Outlook emails to another folder (bulk supported); server restricts valid destinations per source folder and 'sent' is never a valid destination.

latch_copy_email.name: latch_copy_email
latch_copy_email.use: Copy one or more Outlook emails to another folder; destinationId must be one of 'inbox','sent','drafts','deleted','junk','archive','outbox'.

latch_archive_email.name: latch_archive_email
latch_archive_email.use: Archive one or more Outlook emails by moving them to the Archive folder; cannot archive messages already in Archive or in Drafts.

latch_flag_email.name: latch_flag_email
latch_flag_email.use: Flag, unflag, or mark-complete one or more Outlook emails for follow-up in a single bulk action.

latch_list_email_attachments.name: latch_list_email_attachments
latch_list_email_attachments.use: List all attachments on an Outlook email message via Latch.
latch_list_email_attachments.returns: Array of attachment metadata (id, name, contentType, size).

latch_add_email_attachment.name: latch_add_email_attachment
latch_add_email_attachment.params_signature: messageId: string, name: string, textContent?: string, htmlContent?: string, contentBytes?: string, contentType?: string, isInline?: boolean
latch_add_email_attachment.use: Add an attachment to an Outlook draft message; provide exactly one of textContent, htmlContent, or base64 contentBytes; contentType auto-detected from name extension.

latch_get_email_attachment.name: latch_get_email_attachment
latch_get_email_attachment.params_signature: messageId: string, attachmentId?: string, attachmentName?: string, includeContent?: boolean
latch_get_email_attachment.use: Download an Outlook email attachment's content; if no attachment identifier is given, auto-downloads when single or lists choices when multiple exist.
latch_get_email_attachment.returns: Attachment metadata and base64 content, or a list of available attachments if multiple exist.

latch_get_email_mime.name: latch_get_email_mime
latch_get_email_mime.use: Retrieve the raw MIME representation of an Outlook email message via Latch.
latch_get_email_mime.returns: MIME content of the email message

latch_get_email_delta.name: latch_get_email_delta
latch_get_email_delta.params_signature: deltaToken?: string, deltaLink?: string, folderId?: string
latch_get_email_delta.use: Fetch Outlook email changes via delta sync; omit tokens for initial sync, then pass the returned deltaToken on subsequent calls to get only changes.
latch_get_email_delta.returns: Changed messages plus a new deltaToken/deltaLink to use in the next sync call.

latch_list_calendar_events.name: latch_list_calendar_events
latch_list_calendar_events.params_signature: startDateTime?: string, endDateTime?: string, calendarIds?: array
latch_list_calendar_events.use: List Outlook calendar events within an ISO-8601 date range, optionally filtered to specific calendar IDs; defaults span now to one week ahead.
latch_list_calendar_events.returns: Array of calendar event objects; see tool response for exact fields.

latch_create_calendar_event.name: latch_create_calendar_event
latch_create_calendar_event.params_signature: subject: string, startDateTime: string, endDateTime: string, calendarId?: string, location?: string, body?: string, attendees?: array, isAllDay?: boolean, isInPersonMeeting?: boolean, importance?: 'low'|'normal'|'high', showAs?: 'free'|'tentative'|'busy'|'oof'|'workingElsewhere', reminderMinutesBeforeStart?: number, responseRequested?: boolean, allowForwarding?: boolean, categories?: array, isRecurring?: boolean, recurrenceType?: 'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'|'yearly', recurrenceInterval?: integer, recurrenceDaysOfWeek?: array, recurrenceEndDate?: string
latch_create_calendar_event.use: Create an Outlook calendar event; start/end use ISO-8601 datetimes, recurrenceEndDate uses YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to primary calendar and online meeting unless isInPersonMeeting is true.
latch_create_calendar_event.returns: Created event object with id, subject, start/end, and meeting details.

latch_get_calendar_event.name: latch_get_calendar_event
latch_get_calendar_event.use: Retrieve details of a specific Outlook calendar event by its ID via Latch.
latch_get_calendar_event.returns: Event object with fields such as subject, start, end, location, and attendees.

latch_update_calendar_event.name: latch_update_calendar_event
latch_update_calendar_event.params_signature: eventId: string, calendarId?: string, subject?: string, startDateTime?: string, endDateTime?: string, location?: string, body?: string, attendees?: array, isAllDay?: boolean, isInPersonMeeting?: boolean, importance?: 'low'|'normal'|'high', showAs?: 'free'|'tentative'|'busy'|'oof'|'workingElsewhere', reminderMinutesBeforeStart?: number, responseRequested?: boolean, allowForwarding?: boolean, categories?: array, isRecurring?: boolean, recurrenceType?: 'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'|'yearly', recurrenceInterval?: integer, recurrenceDaysOfWeek?: array, recurrenceEndDate?: string
latch_update_calendar_event.use: Update an existing Outlook calendar event; dates use ISO-8601, recurrenceEndDate uses YYYY-MM-DD, and recurrence fields apply only when isRecurring is true.

latch_delete_calendar_event.name: latch_delete_calendar_event
latch_delete_calendar_event.use: Delete an Outlook calendar event via Latch by its event ID.

latch_list_calendars.name: latch_list_calendars
latch_list_calendars.use: List all Outlook calendars in the authenticated user's mailbox via Latch.
latch_list_calendars.returns: Array of calendar objects with fields such as id, name, and owner.

latch_create_calendar.name: latch_create_calendar
latch_create_calendar.use: Create a new Outlook calendar; color accepts a hex code (e.g. '#9d2c2c') or a named preset like darkRed, lightBlue, gray—call get_calendar_colors for the full list.

latch_get_calendar_colors.name: latch_get_calendar_colors
latch_get_calendar_colors.use: List available Outlook calendar color options with their hex values, matching the UI color picker.
latch_get_calendar_colors.returns: Array of color entries with name and hex value fields.

latch_get_calendar.name: latch_get_calendar
latch_get_calendar.use: Retrieve details of a specific Outlook calendar via Latch.
latch_get_calendar.returns: Calendar object with fields such as id, name, owner, and color.

latch_update_calendar.name: latch_update_calendar
latch_update_calendar.params_signature: calendarId: string, name?: string, color?: string
latch_update_calendar.use: Update an existing Outlook calendar's name or color via Latch.

latch_delete_calendar.name: latch_delete_calendar
latch_delete_calendar.use: Delete an Outlook calendar via Latch by its calendar ID.

latch_get_calendar_categories.name: latch_get_calendar_categories
latch_get_calendar_categories.use: List all available Outlook calendar categories (tags) that can be assigned to events.
latch_get_calendar_categories.returns: Array of category objects with fields like name and color.

latch_accept_meeting.name: latch_accept_meeting
latch_accept_meeting.use: Accept an Outlook meeting invitation via Latch; fails if the event is missing, the user isn't an attendee, or the user is the organizer.

latch_decline_meeting.name: latch_decline_meeting
latch_decline_meeting.use: Decline an Outlook meeting invitation; errors if the event is missing, the user is not an attendee, or the user is the organizer.

latch_tentatively_accept_meeting.name: latch_tentatively_accept_meeting
latch_tentatively_accept_meeting.use: Tentatively accept an Outlook meeting invitation; errors if the event is missing, the user isn't an attendee, or the user is the organizer.

latch_cancel_calendar_event.name: latch_cancel_calendar_event
latch_cancel_calendar_event.params_signature: eventId: string, comment?: string, sendCancellation?: boolean
latch_cancel_calendar_event.use: Cancel an Outlook calendar event via Latch, marking it cancelled without deletion and optionally notifying attendees.

latch_list_email_categories.name: latch_list_email_categories
latch_list_email_categories.use: List all email categories defined in the user's Outlook mailbox via Latch.
latch_list_email_categories.returns: Array of category objects (e.g. name, color, id).

latch_get_email_category.name: latch_get_email_category
latch_get_email_category.use: Retrieve details of a specific Outlook email category by its ID via Latch.
latch_get_email_category.returns: Category object with fields such as id, displayName, and color.

latch_create_email_category.name: latch_create_email_category
latch_create_email_category.use: Create a new email category in Latch (Outlook); color accepts preset0 through preset24.

latch_list_contacts.name: latch_list_contacts
latch_list_contacts.use: List contacts in the user's Outlook mailbox, optionally filtering by name or email; returns up to 50 by default (max 250).
latch_list_contacts.returns: Array of contact objects with fields such as name and email.

latch_get_contact.name: latch_get_contact
latch_get_contact.use: Retrieve details of a specific Outlook contact by its ID via Latch.
latch_get_contact.returns: Contact object with fields such as id, displayName, emailAddresses, phones.

latch_create_contact.name: latch_create_contact
latch_create_contact.params_signature: displayName: string, givenName?: string, surname?: string, emailAddresses?: array, businessPhones?: array, mobilePhone?: string, companyName?: string, department?: string, officeLocation?: string, jobTitle?: string, personalNotes?: string
latch_create_contact.use: Create a new Outlook contact in Latch with the given display name and optional personal, contact, and employment details.
latch_create_contact.returns: Created contact object with id, displayName, and other provided fields.

latch_update_contact.name: latch_update_contact
latch_update_contact.params_signature: contactId: string, displayName?: string, givenName?: string, surname?: string, emailAddresses?: array, businessPhones?: array, mobilePhone?: string, companyName?: string, department?: string, officeLocation?: string, jobTitle?: string, personalNotes?: string
latch_update_contact.use: Update fields on an existing Outlook contact via Latch; only provided properties are modified.
latch_update_contact.returns: Updated contact object with id and modified fields.

latch_delete_contact.name: latch_delete_contact
latch_delete_contact.use: Delete an Outlook contact via Latch by its contact ID.

latch_search_people.name: latch_search_people
latch_search_people.use: Search Outlook for people by name or email, ranked by relevance based on email history, shared events, and organization.
latch_search_people.returns: List of people with name, email, and relevance ranking; up to limit (default 10, max 1000).

latch_list_teams.name: latch_list_teams
latch_list_teams.use: List all Microsoft Teams the current user is a member of via Latch (Outlook).
latch_list_teams.returns: Array of teams with name, description, and id fields.

latch_get_team.name: latch_get_team
latch_get_team.use: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Microsoft Team via Latch (Outlook); teamId must be a UUID.
latch_get_team.returns: Team object with displayName, description, visibility, and other settings.

latch_list_team_members.name: latch_list_team_members
latch_list_team_members.use: List all members of a specific Microsoft Team via the Latch (Outlook) integration.

latch_list_team_channels.name: latch_list_team_channels
latch_list_team_channels.use: List all channels in a specific Microsoft Team via Latch (Outlook).
latch_list_team_channels.returns: Array of channel objects with fields such as id, displayName, and description.

latch_get_channel.name: latch_get_channel
latch_get_channel.use: Get details of a specific channel in a Microsoft Team via Latch (Outlook); both IDs must be UUIDs.
latch_get_channel.returns: Channel object with displayName, description, membershipType, and webUrl.

latch_create_channel.name: latch_create_channel
latch_create_channel.params_signature: teamId: string, displayName: string, description?: string, membershipType?: 'standard'|'private'|'shared'
latch_create_channel.use: Create a new channel in a Microsoft Team; teamId must be a UUID, displayName max 50 chars, membershipType defaults to standard.

latch_get_channel_messages.name: latch_get_channel_messages
latch_get_channel_messages.params_signature: teamId: string, channelId: string, limit?: number
latch_get_channel_messages.use: Retrieve recent messages from a specific channel in a Microsoft Team via Outlook/Latch; limit defaults to 20, max 50.
latch_get_channel_messages.returns: List of channel message objects; see tool response for fields.

latch_get_channel_message.name: latch_get_channel_message
latch_get_channel_message.params_signature: teamId: string, channelId: string, messageId: string
latch_get_channel_message.use: Retrieve a specific Outlook/Teams channel message by ID, including full content, sender, and attachments; all IDs must be UUIDs.
latch_get_channel_message.returns: Message object with content, sender, and attachments.

latch_send_channel_message.name: latch_send_channel_message
latch_send_channel_message.params_signature: teamId: string, channelId: string, message: string
latch_send_channel_message.use: Send a message to a specific channel in a Microsoft Team via Latch (Outlook).

latch_update_channel_message.name: latch_update_channel_message
latch_update_channel_message.params_signature: teamId: string, channelId: string, messageId: string, content: string, contentType?: 'text'|'html'
latch_update_channel_message.use: Update the content of an existing Latch (Outlook) channel message; only the original sender can edit, and IDs must be UUIDs.

latch_delete_channel_message.name: latch_delete_channel_message
latch_delete_channel_message.params_signature: teamId: string, channelId: string, messageId: string
latch_delete_channel_message.use: Soft delete a message from a Latch (Outlook) team channel; all IDs must be UUIDs and the message is marked deleted but not permanently removed.

latch_list_drives.name: latch_list_drives
latch_list_drives.use: List all SharePoint document libraries (drives) the current user can access via their Team memberships.
latch_list_drives.returns: Array of drive objects for Teams the user belongs to; see tool response

latch_list_drive_items.name: latch_list_drive_items
latch_list_drive_items.params_signature: driveId: string, folderId?: string, top?: number, skip?: number
latch_list_drive_items.use: List files and folders in a SharePoint drive via Outlook/Latch; omit folderId or pass 'root' for the drive root.
latch_list_drive_items.returns: Array of drive item objects (files/folders with IDs and metadata); see tool response

latch_get_drive_item.name: latch_get_drive_item
latch_get_drive_item.use: Get detailed metadata for a specific file or folder in a SharePoint drive via Latch (Outlook).
latch_get_drive_item.returns: Drive item object with fields like id, name, size, and type.

latch_upload_drive_item.name: latch_upload_drive_item
latch_upload_drive_item.params_signature: driveId: string, parentId: string, fileName: string, content: string, contentType?: string
latch_upload_drive_item.use: Upload a base64-encoded file (max 5MB) to a SharePoint drive folder; use 'root' as parentId for the drive root.

latch_update_drive_item.name: latch_update_drive_item
latch_update_drive_item.params_signature: driveId: string, itemId: string, name?: string, newParentId?: string
latch_update_drive_item.use: Rename or move a file/folder in a SharePoint drive via Latch (Outlook); provide name to rename, newParentId to move, or both.
latch_update_drive_item.returns: Updated drive item object with id, name, and parentReference.

latch_delete_drive_item.name: latch_delete_drive_item
latch_delete_drive_item.use: Soft-delete a file or folder from a SharePoint drive via Outlook Latch; items may be recoverable.

latch_create_folder.name: latch_create_folder
latch_create_folder.params_signature: driveId: string, parentId: string, name: string
latch_create_folder.use: Create a new folder in a SharePoint drive; pass 'root' as parentId to create at the drive root.

atlas_autocomplete.name: atlas_autocomplete
atlas_autocomplete.params_signature: input: string, locationRestriction?: object, includedTypes?: array, page?: number=1, limit?: number=20
atlas_autocomplete.use: Search Atlas Places autocomplete for place suggestions matching the start of words in name/address/city/state; radius is in meters (max 500000).
atlas_autocomplete.returns: Paginated list of place suggestions with fields like name, address, and place type.

atlas_place.name: atlas_place
atlas_place.use: Fetch detailed information for a place from the Atlas Places API v1 by numeric ID or Google-style place_id.

atlas_searchText.name: atlas_searchText
atlas_searchText.params_signature: textQuery: string, locationRestriction?: object, includedTypes?: array, minRating?: number, openNow?: boolean, priceLevels?: array, page?: number=1, limit?: number=20
atlas_searchText.use: Search places via Atlas Places API v1 text search; locationRestriction uses a circle with radius in meters (max 500000), priceLevels take PRICE_LEVEL_* enums.
atlas_searchText.returns: Paginated place results with fields like places, page, limit, and pagination metadata.

atlas_placePhotos.name: atlas_placePhotos
atlas_placePhotos.use: Fetch photos for a place via the Atlas Places API v1; id accepts a numeric ID or a Google-style place_id, and mediaType optionally filters by image category.

atlas_searchNearby.name: atlas_searchNearby
atlas_searchNearby.params_signature: locationRestriction: object, includedTypes: array, excludedTypes?: array, page?: number=1, limit?: number=20
atlas_searchNearby.use: Search for nearby places within a circular area (radius in meters, max 500000) filtered by place types like 'restaurant' or 'cafe' (case-insensitive, 1-10 types required).
atlas_searchNearby.returns: Paginated list of places with details; limit max 50 per page.

atlas_geocodeAddress.name: atlas_geocodeAddress
atlas_geocodeAddress.params_signature: address: string, page?: number=1, limit?: number=20
atlas_geocodeAddress.use: Geocode a street address to coordinates via the Atlas Geocoding API v4beta with paginated results.
atlas_geocodeAddress.returns: Paginated list of geocoded matches with coordinates and address details.

atlas_reverseGeocode.name: atlas_reverseGeocode
atlas_reverseGeocode.params_signature: latitude: number, longitude: number, radius?: number=100, page?: number=1, limit?: number=20
atlas_reverseGeocode.use: Reverse geocode coordinates to find nearby places via Atlas Geocoding API v4beta, sorted by distance; radius in meters (max 1000), limit max 50.
atlas_reverseGeocode.returns: Paginated list of places near the coordinates with pagination metadata.

atlas_geocodePlaceById.name: atlas_geocodePlaceById
atlas_geocodePlaceById.use: Look up location details for a specific place via Geocoding API v4beta; accepts a numeric ID or a Google-style place_id.

atlas_computeRoutes.name: atlas_computeRoutes
atlas_computeRoutes.params_signature: origin: object, destination: object, intermediates?: array, travelMode: 'DRIVE'|'WALK'|'BICYCLE'|'TWO_WHEELER'
atlas_computeRoutes.use: Compute routes via Atlas Directions API v2 between origin and destination with up to 23 intermediate waypoints; all points use {latitude, longitude}.
atlas_computeRoutes.returns: Route data including distance, duration, and polyline/legs; see tool response.

atlas_login.name: atlas_login
atlas_login.use: Log in to Atlas (Maps) with an email address; disabled when LOGGED_IN_USER env is set (forced mode).

atlas_logout.name: atlas_logout
atlas_logout.use: Log out the specified Atlas (Maps) user; disabled when running in forced mode with the LOGGED_IN_USER env var set.

atlas_authStatus.name: atlas_authStatus
atlas_authStatus.use: Get the current Atlas Maps auth configuration status, including whether forced mode is enabled and login/logout availability.
atlas_authStatus.returns: Object with forced mode flag and login/logout availability indicators.

atlas_me.name: atlas_me
atlas_me.use: Get the currently logged-in Atlas (Maps) user, or null if not authenticated.
atlas_me.returns: User details object, or null when not logged in.
